title: What is that?
content:
[![flickr photo](http://farm1.static.flickr.com/178/418515568_b913585fe6_m.jpg)](http://www.flickr.com/photos/macsfbox/418515568/)

I'm certain it's not a cell(phone) repeater. ;p

[![flickr photo](http://farm1.static.flickr.com/183/419665286_0c62687f7d_m.jpg)](http://flickr.com/photos/macsfbox/419665286/)

A little zoom in won't hurt, I suppose. Do you think what I'm thinking? Hee heee
